title: Hesperastragalus reflexus

It belongs to the genus Hesperastragalus, which is a group of plants endemic to the Mediterranean region. The classification of Hesperastragalus reflexus is further divided into the kingdom Plantae, and the class Magnoliopsida. Within the class Magnoliopsida, it is placed in the order Fabales.
